milestones.title: M8 Buildable Foundation
milestones.description: Definition of Done: the repository is a real pnpm TypeScript monorepo with runnable apps, servers, package boundaries, Docker Compose, env templates, and code CI.

milestones.title: M9 Domain and Kernel Runtime v1
milestones.description: Definition of Done: domain types, ledger-backed kernel, reducer, replay, projections, and golden traces execute against real code.

milestones.title: M10 Orchestration and Execution Plane v1
milestones.description: Definition of Done: planner, scheduler, leases, retries, execution packets, validators, workers, and fail-closed execution exist end to end.

milestones.title: M11 GitHub Backbone Runtime
milestones.description: Definition of Done: GitHub App auth, webhooks, outbound sync, inbound reconciliation, and drift detection run against the real runtime.

milestones.title: M12 Control Plane MVP
milestones.description: Definition of Done: auth, sessions, company bootstrap, operator APIs, and the control web app can operate the system without terminal dependence.

milestones.title: M13 Memory and Provenance v1
milestones.description: Definition of Done: memory extraction, retrieval, invalidation, provenance, and contamination controls operate against runtime evidence.

milestones.title: M14 Customer Foundations
milestones.description: Definition of Done: multi-company isolation, invitations, onboarding, config, secrets, multi-repo support, and self-hosted packaging are usable for external customers.

milestones.title: M15 Production Infrastructure and Reliability
milestones.description: Definition of Done: staging and production infrastructure, observability, backups, restore drills, and reliability controls are live.

milestones.title: M16 Internal Alpha and Controlled Beta
milestones.description: Definition of Done: internal dogfooding and controlled external beta run on the real platform with release candidate protections and proven rollback.

milestones.title: M17 General Availability
milestones.description: Definition of Done: hosted and self-hosted releases are customer-ready, supportable, and protected by final release discipline.

issues.title: Deliver M8 Buildable Foundation
issues.body:
Outcome:
Convert the repository from docs-only into a runnable monorepo with real apps, packages, Docker Compose, env templates, and code CI.

Validation:
A fresh clone can install, boot local dependencies, compile the app/server/package graph, and run baseline tests without hidden steps.

issues.title: Deliver M9 Domain and Kernel Runtime v1
issues.milestone: M9 Domain and Kernel Runtime v1
issues.body:
Outcome:
Implement the first real deterministic kernel, ledger persistence, reducer, replay flow, and projection seed over the canonical domain model.

Validation:
Golden traces execute against real kernel code and the historical loop class is covered by replay tests.

issues.title: Deliver M10 Orchestration and Execution Plane v1
issues.milestone: M10 Orchestration and Execution Plane v1
issues.body:
Outcome:
Implement planning, scheduling, leases, retries, execution packets, validators, workers, and the first bounded tool pack.

Validation:
An objective can become a work item, dispatch to a worker, validate output, and end in complete, blocked, or escalated state.

issues.title: Deliver M11 GitHub Backbone Runtime
issues.body:
Outcome:
Implement the GitHub App, webhook processing, outbound sync, inbound reconciliation, and drift detection against the live runtime.

Validation:
GitHub reflects runtime truth for humans without becoming the source of truth.

issues.title: Deliver M12 Control Plane MVP
issues.body:
Outcome:
Implement the control-plane backend and operator web UI with auth, sessions, timelines, approvals, and control actions.

Validation:
An operator can use the web app to inspect and control real runtime activity.

issues.title: Deliver M13 Memory and Provenance v1
issues.body:
Outcome:
Implement memory extraction, retrieval, invalidation, provenance, and contamination guards over runtime and GitHub evidence.

Validation:
Memory improves continuity while remaining auditable and bounded.

issues.title: Deliver M14 Customer Foundations
issues.body:
Outcome:
Implement multi-company isolation, invitations, customer onboarding, per-company config and secrets, multi-repo support, and self-hosted packaging foundations.

Validation:
A second company can onboard without cross-tenant contamination in hosted or self-hosted mode.

issues.title: Deliver M15 Production Infrastructure and Reliability
issues.body:
Outcome:
Stand up AWS hosted infrastructure, observability, backups, restore drills, and reliability controls, plus supported self-hosted infrastructure contracts.

Validation:
Staging and production exist and are operationally recoverable.

issues.title: Deliver M16 Internal Alpha and Controlled Beta
issues.milestone: M16 Internal Alpha and Controlled Beta
issues.body:
Outcome:
Run internal alpha and controlled external beta with release candidates, rollback drills, and stability hardening.

Validation:
The platform runs with real users under measured SLOs before GA.

issues.title: Deliver M17 General Availability
issues.body:
Outcome:
Close the final production readiness gap, restore hard GitHub protections, publish hosted and self-hosted docs, and open general availability.

Validation:
The product is supportable, protected, and customer-ready for GA.
